title: baseline-excursion temporal subtype ledger
repro_tolerance: exact selected-pulse count match to S00/P09a raw ROOT gate
split: leave-one-run-out over current-comparison baseline-excursion rows; run-block bootstrap CIs

leakage_checks.note: script raises before subtype fitting if selected-pulse count mismatches
held-out run never appears in the train sample
all methods score the same baseline-excursion pulses
run, event id, current group, and subtype labels are excluded from SCALAR_FEATURES

falsification.reject_ml_promotion_if: ML-minus-traditional run-bootstrap CI is not wholly above zero or leakage checks fail
falsification.interpretation_limit: subtype truth is train-run-frozen operational pseudo-labeling, not external truth

next_tickets.title: P09i blinded visual calibration of baseline-excursion temporal subtypes
next_tickets.body: Blinded reviewers should score a balanced gallery from the P09h temporal subtype ledger, then compare reviewer agreement and endpoint enrichment against the train-run frozen subtype cuts. Expected information gain: turns the P09h operational pseudo-label ledger into a calibrated uncertainty on which baseline-excursion subtypes are physical enough for downstream veto/recovery policy.
